name: Adopt-A-Demi: The Haven House
description:
Welcome to Haven House

A place where second chances begin.

Haven House is a demi-human adoption and rehabilitation center dedicated to helping residents find comfort, understanding, and a place to belong. Some arrive here after being surrendered, others rescued, and some simply searching for something they couldn’t find on their own.

Take your time. Every resident has their own story... and finding the right connection is what matters most.
creator: Melanin_Mommy
